---
title: "vector_ingest.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\engine\vector_ingest.py"
loc: 15
complexity: 4
logic_score: 7.45
style_score: 3.83
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.93
---

## Intent
The `vector_ingest.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on VectorIngest, __init__, add_skill, load_skills_from_dir. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via VectorIngest, __init__, add_skill, load_skills_from_dir. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `VectorIngest`
- `__init__`
- `add_skill`
- `load_skills_from_dir`
